title: 40 Pack Beach Bucket and Shovel Set Mini Plastic Buckets Sand Shovel Sand Pail Bulk for Kids Summer Seaside Beach Pool Party
features: 【Nolvety Design】: the mini beach bucket and shovel set is a great tool for children's summer parties, allowing them to give full play to their imagination and build their own unique sand castles, which helps promote children's creativity
【Quality Material】: the beach bucket and shovel set is made of safe PP material, with bright colors, not easy to fade and deform, strong and reliable, and can be used for a long time

【Size Information】: the sand buckets is about 13.5 x 8 x 12 cm/ 5.31 x 3.15 x 4.72 inch, mini sand shovel is about 19 x 6 cm/ 7.48 x 2.36 inch, lightweight and suitable for children to play with, adding some fun to their summer parties

【Widely Use】: the beach sand castle buckets are suitable for a variety of occasions, suitable for travel, camping, fishing trips, beach games; they are also children's beach toy gifts for birthdays, beach theme parties, Easter and other occasions

【What Will You Get】: you will get 40 mini pails and shovels, including 20 red, blue, yellow and green small sand buckets and shovels. The quantity is sufficient to meet your beach playing needs. You can also give it as a gift to your friends and enjoy the fun of building sand castles with them
